import numpy as np
from typing import List

def get_top_scores(scores: np.ndarray, n: int) -> List[float]:
    sorted_indices = np.argsort(scores)[::-1]
    top_n = scores[sorted_indices[:n]]
    return top_n.tolist()

def filter_valid(data: np.ndarray, mask: np.ndarray) -> List[float]:
    filtered = data[mask]
    return filtered.tolist()

def compute_stats(values: np.ndarray) -> dict:
    values_list = values.tolist()
    return {
        "mean": np.mean(values_list),
        "std": np.std(values_list),
        "min": min(values_list),
        "max": max(values_list),
        "median": np.median(values_list),
    }

def find_peaks(signal: np.ndarray) -> List[int]:
    diff = np.diff(signal)
    peaks = np.where(diff > 0)[0]
    return peaks.tolist()
